Off Calendar Feb-05-2026 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

No appearances. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

Plaintiff Doris Byeon's Motion To Compel Responses To Form Interrogatories (General), Set One; Form Interrogatories (Employment), Set One; Requests For Admissions, Set One; Requests For Production Of Documents, Set One; And Special Interrogatories, Set One; From Defendant Therapy Match, Inc., Dba Headway, And Request For Monetary Sanctions In The Amount Of $3,560.00 is DENIED.

(see word minutes for full details)

Prior to the hearing, Moving Party shall lodge by email to contestdept302tr@sftc.org a proposed order repeating the above verbatim.

Order is signed.

Judge: Joseph M. Quinn, Clerk: M. Goodman, Not Reported. (302/JMQ)
